plugins.name: self-heal

plugins.name: experiment-harness
plugins.description: Run controlled multi-arm experiments on AI/LLM agent behavior: orchestrator spawns per-phase arm subagents in isolated git worktrees, injects each arm's variant stimulus, runs uniform validation, invokes a blind reviewer, and compiles a comparison report
